title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0804
summary: 1 Disability awards by the New York Workmen's Compensation Board to an interstate railroad employee precipitate this attack on § 113 of that state's Workmen's Compensation Law, McK.Consol.Laws, § 67, as unconstitutionally conflicting with the Federal Employers' Liability Act, 45 U.S.C.A.
